race.comment: VICKIE'S DREAM (6) resumes after having mixed luck in her first campaign and now in the Craig Widdison yard. Ran fourth in a recent trial over 900m at Wangaratta. Expecting a bright start to the prep. SHE'S FIRST LADY (11) gripped on late first-up with a tidy fourth at Albury, then dropped out sharply in stronger company to finish eighth over 1100m at Werribee. Gets a better set-up here and can return to form. METRO GIRL (10) has a few gear changes today and doesn't have to improve much after her fighting first-up sixth over 1100m at Wodonga. Maps well and can take a hand in the finish. HE'S FIERCE (4) deep into the campaign and finds a very average Maiden after running third over 1008m at Sale. Will take catching from the draw.
